_meta.title: M2 — the agent-native pair: ui-surface-host (mount/stream seam) + ui-conversation (thread/composer/narration), composing per-turn
_meta.traces: agent-app-surfaces PRD v1.2 §7 (M2) · PRD-G3/G4/G6 · PRD-D2/D3 · SPEC app-surfaces-m2 (SPEC-R1..R11) · LLD app-surfaces-m2 (LLD-C1..C13) · ADR-0129 (proposed)
_meta.notes: PLAN mode (docs-only intake; the build fan-out dispatches later). Two dispatchable phases: Phase 1 = n1*/n2* (the two elements, ui-surface-host gates ui-conversation since it composes it); Phase 2 = n4*/n3* (the reference-app re-host + generalization-source deletion + integration). n5 = the per-element independent component-reviewer gate. Behavior = the SPEC (SPEC-R#); build = the LLD (LLD-C#). Open LLD forks (§8: transport/produce-loop boundary · composition — does ui-conversation own ui-surface-host internally · narration-vs-wire-disclosure product/dev-tool split · reference-app scope, a2ui-live only or +a2ui-chat) are RECOMMENDED not self-ratified, carried to ADR-0129 for Kim's ruling. Constraints: NEVER edit tokens.css; a concurrent seat owns controls/select + the a2ui-compose skill — cite by anchor, touch neither; deletion of canvas-surface.ts/surface-registry.ts/ask-registry.ts (n4c) MUST follow both re-hosts (n4a/n4b), never precede them.

nodes.label: M2 — agent-emitted content appears with 0 app-written renderer/transport glue (PRD-G3); a multi-turn conversation presents from a primitive (PRD-G4)
nodes.justify: grouping — the milestone root; its subsystems are the two primitives, the wiring/integration slice, and the reference-app re-host that proves both

nodes.label: ui-surface-host — the mount/stream seam (components-adjacent, app-tier)
nodes.justify: grouping — subsystem: the single-RendererHost element + its CSS + descriptor + gates

nodes.label: ui-surface-host element — app/src/controls/surface-host/surface-host.ts: extends UIElement, builds the stage/surface artboard pair at connect, constructs ONE createRenderer() host, exposes ingest/finalize/dispose/onClientMessage, applyRootStretch on finalize
nodes.accept: `npm run check` exit 0; UISurfaceHostElement extends UIElement (formAssociated:false, light-DOM default); connectedCallback builds the checkered stage + translate-centered surface pair (canvas-surface.ts's proven CSS/DOM, promoted verbatim) as its OWN subtree (never author-slotted) and mounts a fresh createRenderer() RendererHost into it; ingest(line) forwards to the host (no-op + dev warning pre-connect, never throws); finalize() forwards + calls applyRootStretch on the surface; dispose() tears down the host (idempotent-safe); onClientMessage(cb) registers on the host; imports ONLY createRenderer/RendererHost/A2uiClientMessage/ClientMessageListener from the @agent-ui/a2ui PUBLIC barrel (grep-guarded — no packages/agent-ui/a2ui/tools/** import, no transport/provider-shaped type anywhere in the file); `label` is the only reflected prop (optional accessible name)

nodes.label: surface-host CSS — controls/surface-host/surface-host.css: the checkered-artboard geometry promoted from site/lib/canvas-surface.css, renamed to --ui-surface-host-*
nodes.accept: `npm run check`/browser green; single-file sectioned (ADR-0003): a :where(ui-surface-host) token block declaring ONLY --ui-surface-host-* then @scope (ui-surface-host); visual parity with today's a2ui-live Canvas tab (whole-shape non-zero stage/surface boxes); the checkered background may simplify under forced-colors:active (decorative, not information-bearing) as long as a mounted control's OWN forced-colors handling still holds

nodes.label: surface-host descriptor + gates — controls/surface-host/{surface-host.md, surface-host.test.ts, surface-host.browser.test.ts}
nodes.accept: `npm run check` exit 0; surface-host.md validates against the ADR-0004 frontmatter schema (tier:structural, extends:UIElement), contract↔props trip-wire equals finalize(UISurfaceHostElement) GREEN; surface-host.test.ts (jsdom) proves pre-connect ingest/finalize are no-ops (dev warning, no throw), ingest→finalize renders a stubbed A2UI stream's root inside the surface, dispose tears down (idempotent on a second call), onClientMessage delivers a stubbed client message to a registered callback; surface-host.browser.test.ts (Chromium AND WebKit) proves whole-shape (non-zero stage/surface boxes), a REAL A2UI stream renders a real interactive control, forced-colors legibility of the mounted control

nodes.label: ui-conversation — thread + composer + per-turn narration + per-surface registry (app-tier), after n1 (composes ui-surface-host)
nodes.justify: grouping — subsystem: the element + its internal registry/narration mechanism + CSS + descriptor + gates

nodes.label: ui-conversation element — app/src/controls/conversation/conversation.ts: extends UIElement, owns its OWN thread/composer DOM (never author-composed), addUserMessage/beginAgentTurn()/onSubmit/onClientMessage/reset, an internal SurfaceRegistry generalized to compose ui-surface-host children keyed by surfaceId (fresh id -> new host inline in that turn's bubble; known id -> route to its original host/bubble; deleteSurface -> dispose + visible 'Closed.' annotation, never silently dropped)
nodes.accept: `npm run check` exit 0; UIConversationElement extends UIElement (formAssociated:false, light-DOM default); addUserMessage(text) appends a user bubble unmodified; beginAgentTurn() returns an AgentTurnHandle {ingestLine, setNote, finalize, fail} — NOT a DOM type; ingestLine routes by surfaceId (surfaceIdOf precedent) to a FRESH ui-surface-host created + appended into that turn's own bubble, or a KNOWN surfaceId's ORIGINAL host/bubble (persistent identity across turns — depends on ADR-0128's resend-reconciliation fix, already accepted), or narration-only for a no-id line; deleteSurface disposes that one ui-surface-host + appends a visible, non-removable 'Closed.' note to its bubble; onSubmit(cb)/onClientMessage(cb) are callback registrations (NOT CustomEvents — naming.md §4's closed six-event vocabulary has no submission/client-message kind, the RendererHost.onClientMessage precedent followed instead); every internally-created ui-surface-host is wired onClientMessage(m => registered callback(m)) at creation (bubble-up); reset() disposes every open surface host + clears the thread DOM; `disclosure` is the only reflected prop (boolean, default false); the scroll-follow guard (isNearLogBottom/tailFollowLog, sampled ONCE per turn before that turn's own content grows the log, never re-sampled reactively) is promoted from a2ui-chat.ts UNCHANGED

nodes.label: narration integration — conversation.ts (narration slice): categoryOf/narrateCategories/narrateTrace + the ui-status-stream composition per agent turn, promoted from a2ui-chat.ts unchanged
nodes.accept: `npm test` exit 0 incl. a jsdom case; each agent turn's bubble reserves narration/note/mounts in that literal order (a fresh surface's mount never displaces the note/narration above it regardless of streaming timing); categoryOf derives open/restructure/react/close from the SAME envelope-key inspection a2ui-live's summarize() and a2ui-chat's categoryOf already use (never a re-invented parser); narrateCategories renders ONE entry per distinct category in emission order, pending->active->done; narrateTrace renders the turn's real TurnTrace fields verbatim when supplied (optional — absent on the recorded transcript, present only on a live arm) with NO gloss/re-derivation; a turn with no note falls back to a factual message-kind tally (summarize()), NEVER a fabricated sentence (ADR-0088); a thrown turn (handle.fail(message)) truncates narration with an error entry via a genuine finally (not a try-scoped mistake) and still calls finalize() cleanly

nodes.label: conversation CSS + descriptor + gates — controls/conversation/{conversation.css, conversation.md, conversation.test.ts, conversation.browser.test.ts}
nodes.accept: `npm run check` + `npm test` + `npm run test:browser` green; conversation.css single-file sectioned (ADR-0003), :where(ui-conversation) token block declaring ONLY --ui-conversation-* (promoted/renamed from a2ui-chat.css) then @scope (ui-conversation); conversation.md validates against ADR-0004, contract↔props trip-wire equals finalize(UIConversationElement) GREEN; jsdom proves addUserMessage/beginAgentTurn routing/persistent-surface-identity-across-two-turns/deleteSurface-visible-annotation/onSubmit-callback-fires-once-trimmed/no-listener-no-throw; browser (Chromium AND WebKit) proves whole-shape thread+composer, scroll-follow-when-near-bottom vs preserved-when-scrolled-away (biting NC: a naive reactive scroll-listener regresses this — the a2ui-chat.ts banner's own documented failure mode), forced-colors legibility of composer/narration/Closed-annotations

nodes.label: wiring + integration (SERIAL INTEGRATION + read-only re-checks)
nodes.justify: grouping — subsystem: the layering trip-wire extension, the catalog residue re-check, and the barrel/size re-base done once

nodes.label: layering trip-wire extension — app/src/layering.test.ts: proves @agent-ui/a2ui is now a GENUINELY exercised import (not just declared), NC still bites
nodes.accept: `npm test` exit 0; app/src/layering.test.ts passes with ui-surface-host's real @agent-ui/a2ui import present (no widening of the allowed-specifier set — components/a2ui/shared/local was already permitted at M1); the planted upward/self @agent-ui/app import NC (a2ui/src or components/src importing @agent-ui/app) still goes RED after this change — re-run, not re-authored

nodes.label: catalog residue-guard re-check — a2ui/src/catalog/default/index.test.ts (READ-ONLY re-run, no edit expected)
nodes.accept: `npm test` exit 0 incl. a2ui/src/catalog/default/index.test.ts UNCHANGED and green — ui-surface-host/ui-conversation are app-tier (@agent-ui/app), structurally outside the gate's FLEET_TYPES scan scope (which enumerates @agent-ui/components descriptors only), the same way ui-app-shell/ui-master-detail/ui-settings needed no EXCLUSION_ALLOWLIST row; this node is a verification step, not a code change

nodes.label: public barrel + size re-base — app/src/index.ts, package.json exports (./surface-host, ./conversation + .css subpaths), scripts/measure-size.mjs
nodes.accept: `npm run size` exit 0 with the @agent-ui/app line-item's ceiling RE-BASED measured-at-build (current marginal 24829 B gz within a 26624 B gz budget — insufficient headroom for two new elements, a fresh ceiling is set against the ACTUAL post-M2 tree, the M1/M4 kickoff discipline, never guessed in advance); app/src/index.ts exports UISurfaceHostElement/UIConversationElement; package.json gains ./surface-host, ./surface-host.css, ./conversation, ./conversation.css (bare ./{name} shape, naming.md §8's app/router rule); a tree-shake probe shows importing ui-surface-host ALONE (without ui-conversation) drags only it + @agent-ui/a2ui's real deps; a planted over-budget number proves the gate bites; SINGLE-WRITER for measure-size.mjs/package.json exports this wave

nodes.label: reference-app re-host (proves PRD-G3/G4; the generalization sources retired)
nodes.justify: grouping — subsystem: both site pages re-expressed on the primitives, then the now-redundant site/lib embryos deleted

nodes.label: a2ui-live re-host — site/pages/a2ui-live.{ts,css}: the persistent canvas -> ui-surface-host; the chat pane + inline 'ask' mounting (ADR-0097 §2) -> ui-conversation
nodes.accept: `npm run check`(+check:site) + `npm run build` + `npm test` + `npm run test:browser` green; a2ui-live's Canvas-tab artboard is a single <ui-surface-host> replacing createCanvasSurface()+the page's own createRenderer()/host.mount() wiring; the chat pane is a <ui-conversation> whose beginAgentTurn()/ingestLine() the page's OWN runTurn() drives (the transport/produce-loop call site is UNCHANGED — still site/lib/agent-runtime.ts, per SPEC-R8 AC2); the ADR-0097 ask-freeze semantics (pending/answered/bypassed) are preserved via the SAME persistent-surface-identity mechanism ui-conversation now owns natively; the rendered [chat|canvas] layout is unchanged vs. the pre-re-host snapshot (browser); git diff --stat shows net-negative bespoke LOC on this page's own chrome/wiring

nodes.label: a2ui-chat re-host — site/pages/a2ui-chat.{ts,css}: the whole page (single scrolling log, narration, wire disclosure, persistent per-surface identity) -> ui-conversation in full, parallel-safe with n4a
nodes.accept: `npm run check`(+check:site) + `npm run build` + `npm test` + `npm run test:browser` green; the page becomes a thin shell around ONE <ui-conversation disclosure> whose beginAgentTurn()/ingestLine() the page's OWN turn loop drives (transport call site UNCHANGED); every existing a2ui-chat acceptance holds (persistent surface identity across turns, per-category narration, the opt-in wire disclosure) now sourced from the shipped primitive instead of the page's own SurfaceRegistry/categoryOf/narrateCategories copies; git diff --stat shows net-negative bespoke LOC

nodes.label: generalization-source deletion — site/lib/{canvas-surface.ts, canvas-surface.css, surface-registry.ts, surface-registry.test.ts, ask-registry.ts} removed, SERIAL after n4a+n4b both land
nodes.accept: `npm run check`(+check:site) + `npm test` + `npm run build` green with the five files DELETED; a repo-wide grep confirms zero remaining import of canvas-surface/surface-registry/ask-registry from any site page or lib module BEFORE this node runs (the ordering guard — this node is invalid if n4a or n4b has not yet landed); this is the concrete, provable retirement of the site-land mechanism ui-conversation/ui-surface-host now own, closing PRD-G6's coherence bar (no two parallel hand-built implementations of the same lifecycle survive M2)

nodes.label: independent component-reviewer gates — one per element, pre-commit NO-GO (ui-surface-host · ui-conversation)
nodes.accept: component-reviewer verdict recorded GO (zero blockers; COMPOSE ≥4 AND REALIZE ≥4) on ui-surface-host BEFORE its commit, and on ui-conversation (incl. its internal ui-surface-host composition + narration + registry mechanism) BEFORE its commit; any NO-GO is closed + delta-re-reviewed to GO

actions.label: own exactly one RendererHost per instance: mount at connect, ingest lines, finalize, dispose
expose the mount/stream seam as imperative public methods, never a transport/provider-shaped prop
style the artboard geometry, promoted from the proven site embryo, forced-colors-legible
describe ui-surface-host in a descriptor and pass the contract↔props trip-wire
prove ui-surface-host whole-shape + real-stream rendering cross-engine (Chromium AND WebKit)
render an opaque, non-author-composed thread of user/agent/system turns with a composer
narrate each agent turn honestly via ui-status-stream, never fabricating text
compose one ui-surface-host per open surface, routing fresh vs. known surfaceIds to persistent identity
expose the reply affordance and outbound client messages as callbacks, not synthesized DOM events
describe ui-conversation in a descriptor and pass the contract↔props trip-wire
prove ui-conversation whole-shape + scroll-follow + narration + persistent-surface-identity cross-engine
keep @agent-ui/a2ui a genuinely exercised, no-cycle dependency of @agent-ui/app
confirm both primitives stay outside the a2ui catalog gate's scan scope, no allowlist entry
re-base the @agent-ui/app size budget measured-at-build and export both primitives' subpaths
re-express a2ui-live's canvas + chat + asks on the two primitives, transport call sites unchanged
re-express a2ui-chat in full on ui-conversation, transport call site unchanged
delete the now-redundant site/lib generalization sources once both re-hosts land
judge each primitive COMPOSE/REALIZE ≥4 before its commit (the reviewer gate)

edges.why: the CSS styles the element's stage/surface DOM
the descriptor mirrors the element's static props; the gates exercise it
the browser gate proves the styled whole-shape
ui-conversation's internal registry composes ui-surface-host instances
the narration slice reads/annotates the element's own turn bubbles
the CSS styles the element's thread/composer DOM; the gates exercise both
the browser gate proves narration renders correctly styled and cross-engine
the layering trip-wire re-runs against the now-real @agent-ui/a2ui import surface-host adds
the catalog residue re-check verifies the shipped descriptor stays out of scope
the barrel/size re-base is measured against the final, layering-clean tree
a2ui-live's re-host consumes the finished, gated ui-conversation + ui-surface-host
a2ui-live's canvas re-host consumes the finished, gated ui-surface-host
a2ui-chat's re-host consumes the finished, gated ui-conversation
deletion of the generalization sources may only follow the re-host that stops needing them
same ordering guard for a2ui-chat's own sources (surface-registry.ts, ask-registry.ts)
the reviewer gate judges the fully wired, sized, integrated elements
the reviewer gate also judges the reference-app re-host that proves both primitives
